nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives PROJECT_POSITIONS_CONFIRMED events from MX_00_Event_Router

nodes.name: Parse Event Data
nodes.notes: Extracts project_id and calculates step_key

nodes.name: Claim Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Atomic claim to prevent duplicate processing

nodes.name: Step Claimed?
nodes.notes: If claimed=true: proceed. If false: skip (idempotent)

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  op.id as position_id,
  op.position_number,
  COALESCE(op.catalog_code, '') as catalog_code,
  op.title,
  op.quantity,
  op.unit,
  op.trade::text as trade,
  os.title as room_name,
  os.id as section_id,
  os.room_measurement_id,
  p.project_number,
  p.name as project_name,
  p.object_street
FROM offer_positions op
JOIN offer_sections os ON op.section_id = os.id
JOIN offers o ON op.offer_id = o.id
JOIN projects p ON o.project_id = p.id
WHERE o.project_id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid
  AND op.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY os.sort_order, op.sort_order;

nodes.name: Load Positions
nodes.notes: Step 1: Load all offer positions with room/project info

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  room_name,
  floor_area_m2,
  wall_area_m2,
  ceiling_area_m2,
  COALESCE(floor_perimeter_m, perimeter_m) as room_perimeter_m,
  room_height_m
FROM project_room_measurements
WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid;

nodes.name: Load Room Measurements
nodes.notes: Step 2: Load room measurements (MagicPlan data)

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  catalog_position_nr,
  catalog_source,
  material_name,
  default_qty,
  unit,
  gewerk,
  product_pool_id,
  multiplier_field,
  multiplier_factor,
  note
FROM catalog_material_mapping
WHERE is_active = true
ORDER BY catalog_position_nr, gewerk;

nodes.name: Load Material Mappings
nodes.notes: Step 3: Load all active catalog_material_mapping entries

nodes.name: Calculate + Consolidate
nodes.notes: Steps 4+5: For each position, lookup materials, calculate qty from room data, consolidate by gewerk

nodes.name: Build Upsert SQL
nodes.notes: Step 6a: Builds idempotent UPSERT SQL for project_material_needs

nodes.name: Write Materials to DB
nodes.notes: Step 6b: Execute UPSERT — idempotent, ON CONFLICT updates qty

nodes.name: Merge Write Result
nodes.notes: Merges DB write result count with calculation data

nodes.name: Complete Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Marks workflow step as DONE with summary payload

parameters.query:
-- Mark input event as processed
DO $$ BEGIN
  UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.event_id }}'::uuid;
EXCEPTION WHEN invalid_text_representation THEN NULL;
END $$;

-- Emit MATERIAL_LIST_GENERATED event
INSERT INTO events (event_type, project_id, payload, source_system, source_flow, reference_table, reference_id, dedupe_key)
VALUES (
  'MATERIAL_LIST_GENERATED',
  '{{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'total_items', {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.total_items }},
    'total_gewerke', {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.total_gewerke }},
    'total_detail_lines', {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.total_detail_lines }},
    'gewerke', '{{ JSON.stringify($('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.gewerke) }}'::jsonb,
    'unmatched_positions', '{{ JSON.stringify($('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.unmatched_positions) }}'::jsonb
  ),
  'n8n',
  'M4_05_Material_List_Generator',
  'projects',
  '{{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  'mat_list_' || '{{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.project_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (source_system, dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET payload = EXCLUDED.payload, created_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, event_type::text, project_id;

nodes.name: Emit MATERIAL_LIST_GENERATED
nodes.notes: Step 7: Marks input event processed and emits MATERIAL_LIST_GENERATED

parameters.text:
=📦 *Materialliste generiert*

📍 {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.project_number }} · {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.object_street }}

📋 {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.total_items }} Artikel, {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.total_gewerke }} Gewerke
🏠 {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.rooms.length }} Räume
📝 {{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.total_detail_lines }} Detail-Positionen

{{ $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.unmatched_positions.length > 0 ? '⚠️ ' + $('Merge Write Result').item.json.stats.unmatched_positions.length + ' Positionen ohne Mapping' : '✅ Alle Positionen gemappt' }}

→ Zur Freigabe im Material-Center

nodes.name: Telegram Notify
nodes.notes: Step 8: Sends material list summary to Dennis via Telegram

nodes.name: Done (Success)
nodes.notes: Success response with summary stats

nodes.name: Handle Not Claimed
nodes.notes: Handles duplicate trigger — returns skip response
